close_reason: Renamed pre-commit.hooks to git-hooks.hooks in buck2.nix
description:
The devenv option 'pre-commit' has been renamed to 'git-hooks'.

Warning seen:
```
evaluation warning: The option 'pre-commit' defined in 
'/nix/store/.../nix/devenv/turnkey/buck2.nix' has been renamed to 'git-hooks'.
```

Need to update nix/devenv/turnkey/buck2.nix to use the new option name.
title: Fix pre-commit -> git-hooks deprecation warning
